data.overview: Bộ phim xoay quanh một cô gái 17 tuổi mắc chứng dị ứng ánh nắng mặt trời, buộc phải sống khép kín và chỉ có thể ra ngoài vào ban đêm, nơi cô tìm thấy niềm vui khi chơi guitar và tình cờ gặp một chàng trai mà mình thầm ngưỡng mộ, mối quan hệ dần nảy nở trong những khoảnh khắc lãng mạn dưới màn đêm nhưng cũng đầy căng thẳng khi cô che giấu căn bệnh
data.title: Ánh Dương Trong Đêm

data.biography: Ewan Mitchell (born March 8, 1997) is an English actor. He is known for his roles in the ITV period drama The Halcyon (2017), the medieval series The Last Kingdom (2017–2022), the BBC war drama World on Fire (2019–), and the HBO fantasy series House of the Dragon (2022–). He has also appeared in the ITV crime thriller Trigger Point (2022) and Claire Denis' film High Life (2018).
data.name: Ewan Mitchell

data.biography: Ewan Mitchell est un acteur britannique né le 8 mars 1997 à Derby, en Angleterre. Il est surtout connu pour ses rôles dans des séries télévisées à succès. Entre 2017 et 2022, il incarne Osferth dans la série médiévale "The Last Kingdom". En 2019, il joue Tom Bennett dans le drame de la BBC "World on Fire". Depuis 2022, il interprète le prince Aemond Targaryen dans la série fantastique "House of the Dragon", préquelle de "Game of Thrones". Au cinéma, il apparaît notamment dans "High Life" (2018) de Claire Denis et "Saltburn" (2023) d'Emerald Fennell.

Юэн Митчелл (родился 8 марта 1997 года) - английский актер. Он известен своими ролями в исторической драме ITV "Безмятежный отдых" (2017), средневековом сериале "Последнее королевство" (2017-2022), военной драме BBC "Мир в огне" (2019–) и фантастическом сериале HBO "Дом дракона" (2022–). Он также снялся в криминальном триллере ITV Trigger Point (2022) и фильме Клэр Дени "Светская жизнь" (2018).
data.name: Юэн Митчелл

data.biography: Safarina Mum atau lebih dikenali sebagai Dian P. Ramlee merupakan seorang pelakon, pemuzik dan pengacara wanita Malaysia. Beliau merupakan anak angkat kepada Allahyarham Tan Sri P. Ramlee. Dian memulakan kerjayanya sebagai pemain bes untuk menubuhkan Soft White Eyes yang diketuai oleh yang diketuai oleh tiga orang Umarul yang merupakan pemain gitar utama Kumpulan Iklim (gitar utama), Amy Search (penyanyi utama dan gitar irama) dan Yantzen (dram) pada tahun 1973. Pada tahun 1978, Awang menjadi pemain gitar utama untuk menyertai kumpulan Soft White Eyes manakala Umarul diserap sebagai pemain gitar kedua dan kumpulan ini menukar namanya menjadi Kumpulan Titanic pada tahun 1979 dan berkubur pada tahun 1981 sekaligus menghidupkan kembali pada tahun 1983.
data.name: Dian P. Ramlee

data.biography: Safira Ratu Sofya (born 15 April 2004) is an Indonesian actress and model. Her name became known thanks to his roles in the series "Topeng Kaca" and "Dari Jendela SMP".
data.name: Safira Ratu Sofya

data.biography: Wu Gang (born 9 December 1962) is a Chinese actor. He is known for his roles in Red Firecracker, Green Firecracker (1994), and Iron Man (2009) for which he won both Golden Rooster Award for Best Actor and Shanghai Film Critics Award for Best Actor.
data.name: Wu Gang

data.biography:
吴刚，北京人民艺术剧院国家一级演员。代表作有话剧《雷雨》、电视剧《潜伏》、电影《铁人》等。

1986年8月15日，参演的话剧《二次大战中的帅克》在首都剧场首演，从此开始了演艺生涯。1988年6月12日，参演话剧《天下第一楼》。1991年，出演的历史电影《毛泽东和他的儿子》上映。1996年，参演的战争剧《东周列国·春秋篇》播出。

2001年，主演风格独特的都市情感剧《堆积情感》。2004年，出演的侦探悬疑《黑蚂蚁》。2007年，出演的古装剧《秋海棠》；同年主演的剧情片《箱子》上映，获得第14届北京大学生电影节最佳男主角奖。2008年，出演电视剧《潜伏》，获得第1届电视剧导演工作委员会表彰大典优秀男配角奖。2009年，在电影《铁人》中饰演铁人王进喜，获得 第27届中国电影金鸡奖 最佳男主角 。

2011年，出演《汉阳造》。2013年，出演谍战情感大剧《我的绝密生涯》。2014年参演电视剧《十月围城》。2015年出演电影《三体》。2017年凭借反腐剧《人民的名义》荣获第23届上海电视节最佳男配角奖，同年主演动作片《战狼2》。2019年，主演的缉毒题材剧《破冰行动》，获得第15届中美电视节年度最佳男主角奖；同年主演的剧情电影《妈阁是座城》在中国内地上映，获得第15届中美电影节年度最佳男主角奖。
data.name: 吴刚

data.biography:
吳剛，北京人民藝術劇院國家一級演員。代表作有話劇《雷雨》、電視劇《兒兇》、電影《鐵人》等。

1986 年 8 月 15 日，參演的話劇《二次大戰中的帥克》在首都劇場首演，從此開始了演藝生涯。1988 年 6 月 12 日，參演話劇《天下第一樓》。1991 年，出演的歷史電影《毛澤東和他的兒子》上映。1996 年，參演的戰爭劇《東周列國·春秋篇》播出。

2001 年，主演風格獨特的都市情感劇《堆積情感》。2004 年，出演的偵探懸疑《黑螞蟻》。2007 年，出演的古裝劇《秋海棠》；同年主演的劇情片《箱子》上映，獲得第 14 屆北京大學生電影節最佳男主角獎。2008 年，出演電視劇《兒兇》，獲得第 1 屆電視劇導演工作委員會表彰大典優秀男配角獎。2009 年，在電影《鐵人》中飾演鐵人王進喜，獲得 第 27 屆中國電影金雞獎 最佳男主角 。

2011 年，出演《漢陽造》。2013 年，出演諜戰情感大劇《我的絕密生涯》。2014 年參演電視劇《十月圍城》。2015 年出演電影《三體》。2017 年憑藉反腐劇《人民的名義》榮獲第 23 屆上海電視節最佳男配角獎，同年主演動作片《戰狼 2》。2019 年，主演的緝毒題材劇《破冰行動》，獲得第 15 屆中美電視節年度最佳男主角獎；同年主演的劇情電影《媽閣是座城》在中國內地上映，獲得第 15 屆中美電影節年度最佳男主角獎。
data.name: 吳剛

data.biography: Wendy Crewson (born May 9, 1956) is a Canadian actress known for her versatile performances in film and television. She has had a prolific career spanning several decades, appearing in a wide range of roles across various genres. Crewson has starred in numerous popular movies, including The Good Son (1993), The Santa Clause series (1994 - 2006), Air Force One (1997), Bicentennial Man (1999), What Lies Beneath (2000), Room (2015), and On the Basis of Sex (2018). She has acted in many television movies and series such as 24 (2003), Saving Hope (2012 - 2017), and Tracker (2024 - 2025).
data.name: Wendy Crewson

data.biography:
Wendy Crewson (* 9. Mai 1956 in Hamilton, Kanada) ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin und Produzentin. Sie begann ihre Karriere im Fernsehen und wurde durch ihre Rolle in The Doctor (1991) bekannt.

Crewson spielte in zahlreichen Hollywood-Filmen, darunter The Good Son (1993), Santa Clause (1994), Air Force One (1997) und Bicentennial Man (1999). Später war sie in What Lies Beneath (2000), The 6th Day (2000) und The Covenant (2006) zu sehen.

Neben Blockbustern wirkte sie in Independent-Filmen wie Better Than Chocolate (1999), Suddenly Naked (2001) und Away from Her (2006) mit. Sie spielte auch in Room (2015) und Into the Forest (2015).

Crewson gewann mehrere Preise, darunter sechs Gemini Awards und zwei Canadian Screen Awards. Im Fernsehen hatte sie Rollen in 24, Revenge und Saving Hope (2012–2017).

Sie studierte an der Queen’s University und der Webber Douglas Academy. Crewson engagiert sich für soziale Projekte und bleibt eine prägende Figur im kanadischen Film und Fernsehen.
Wendy Crewson (Hamilton, Canadà, 9 de maig de 1956) és una actriu canadenca.
温迪·克鲁森 （Wendy Crewson） 是一位加拿大女演员，以其在电影和电视中的多才多艺的表演而闻名。她拥有数十年的多产职业生涯，出演过各种类型的各种角色。克鲁森出演了多部热门电影，包括《圣诞老人》系列、《空军一号》和《好儿子》。她的才华和适应能力使她能够塑造不同的角色，使她成为娱乐界备受尊敬的人物，尤其是在加拿大和美国的电影中。
data.name: 温迪·克鲁森

data.biography: 温迪·克魯森 （温迪·克魯森） 是一位加拿大女演員，以其在電影和電視中的多才多藝的表演而聞名。她擁有數十年的多產職業生涯，出演過各種類型的各種角色。克魯森出演了多部熱門電影，包括《今個聖誕大件事》系列、《空軍一號》和《好兒子》。她的才華和適應能力使她能夠塑造不同的角色，使她成為娛樂界備受尊敬的人物，尤其是在加拿大和美國的電影中。
data.name: 温迪·克魯森

data.biography: 乔诗语，女，新生代配音演员，曾为多部电视剧女主角配音，如《一起来看流星雨》楚雨荨（郑爽 饰）、《宫锁珠帘》怜儿（袁姗姗 饰）、《宫锁心玉》晴川（杨幂 饰）、《夏家三千金》夏天美（唐嫣 饰）等等。

data.biography: 喬詩語，女，新生代配音演員，曾為多部電視劇女主角配音，如《一起來看流星雨》楚雨蕁（鄭爽 飾）、《宮鎖珠簾》憐兒（袁姍姍 飾）、《宮鎖心玉》晴川（楊冪 飾）、《夏家三千金》夏天美（唐嫣 飾）等等。

data.biography:
Nunew Chawarin Perdpiriyawong is a Thai singer, actor, model and host under DOMUNDI TV and DMD Music. He graduated with a bachelor's degree from Kasetsart University's Faculty of Humanities, majoring in Chinese Language.

He made his acting debut in 2022 with a main role in the series "Cutie Pie". Nunew is also known for his singing career. In July 2023, he officially debuted as a solo artist with the release of his first single "Anything (หมอนอิง)".

Outside his career in entertainment, Nunew owns a vitamin gummies brand called 'NuMin'.
data.name: Chawarin Perdpiriyawong
ชวรินทร์ เพริศพิริยะวงศ์

data.biography:
Jay Manuel (born August 14, 1972) is a Canadian TV host, Creative Director, make-up artist, and author. He is most recognizable as the Creative Director on the popular reality television show America's Next Top Model for the first eighteen seasons. Manuel also was featured as the host of Canada's Next Top Model.

Manuel is the Founder and CEO of the beauty line, Jay Manuel Beauty. In 2017, the brand opened its first retail location at Roosevelt Field Mall. Later that year, he was one of the judges for Miss Universe 2017. In 2020, he released his first book, The Wig, The Bitch & The Meltdown.
data.name: Jay Manuel

data.biography:
Phillip Jack Brooks, better known by the ring name CM Punk, is an American professional wrestler, sports commentator, actor, and retired mixed martial artist, currently signed to World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE), best known for his influential WWE career, highlighted by his era-defining rivalry with John Cena.

Brooks began his professional wrestling career in 1999 on the independent circuit, most notably with Ring of Honor (ROH), where he won the ROH World Championship once. He signed with WWE in 2005 and went on to become a multi-time world champion, also holding the Intercontinental, ECW World Heavyweight, and World Tag Team Championships, becoming WWE’s 19th Triple Crown Champion and the fastest to achieve the distinction. He was the only back-to-back Money in the Bank winner, headlined multiple WWE pay-per-view events, won Superstar of the Year at the 2011 Slammy Awards, and was named Wrestler of the Year in 2011 and 2012 by readers of Pro Wrestling Illustrated. Disillusioned with WWE, he left the company acrimoniously and retired from professional wrestling in 2014.

After leaving WWE, Brooks pursued a career in mixed martial arts and signed with the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC). Competing as a welterweight, he made his professional debut at UFC 203 in 2016, losing to Mickey Gall via submission, and later fought Mike Jackson at UFC 225 in 2018 in a bout that was later overturned to a no-contest, after which he was released.

Following his MMA run, Brooks transitioned into sports commentary and media appearances, including work as an analyst on WWE Backstage from 2019 to 2020.

In 2021, Brooks returned to professional wrestling by signing with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), making his highly publicized debut at AEW Rampage: The First Dance. During his run, he won the AEW World Championship twice and served as one of the promotion’s most prominent and polarizing figures before departing the company in 2023. Later that year, he returned to WWE, resuming his in-ring career with the promotion.

Throughout his career, Brooks has wrestled exclusively under the CM Punk moniker, portraying an outspoken, confrontational, sharp-tongued, anti-establishment character rooted in his straight-edge lifestyle. His persona has emphasized different aspects of those traits depending on whether he was positioned as a hero or a villain.

Outside wrestling, Brooks has acted in film and television, including the horror films Girl on the Third Floor (2019) and Rabid (2019), recurring roles on Mayans M.C. (2019) and the Syfy supernatural series Revival (2024), adapted from a cult comic and built around the dead suddenly returning to life, and voiced zebra ZPD officer Zebro Zebrowski in Disney’s animated feature Zootopia 2 (2025), alongside fellow wrestler Roman Reigns as zebra ZPD officer Zebro Zebraxton.
data.name: Phil Brooks

data.biography: Toby Poser is a film and theater actor, writer, director, producer, and voice over artist. She was born in Huntingdon, PA and lives in both New York and California with her creative partner and husband, John Adams, and their daughters, Lulu and Zelda Adams. The four of them make independent films under the marquee of Wonder Wheel Productions.
data.name: Toby Poser

data.biography:
王伟梁，出生于香港，香港无线电视艺人。

在1990年代初期活跃，戏路很广，出演《杨贵妃》《洛神》等电视剧被观众记住。

代表作品：《情浓大地》《醉打金枝》《寻秦记》《封神榜》等。
data.name: 王伟梁

data.biography:
王偉梁，出生於香港，香港無線電視藝人。

在 1990 年代初期活躍，戲路很廣，出演《楊貴妃》《洛神》等電視劇被觀眾記住。

belongs_to_collection.name: Loạt phim Ngọn Đồi Câm Lặng

data.overview: Khi James nhận được một bức thư bí ẩn từ Mary — người yêu đã mất của mình — anh bị kéo trở lại Silent Hill, thị trấn quen thuộc một thời nay đã chìm trong bóng tối. Trong hành trình tìm kiếm cô, James phải đối mặt với những sinh vật quái dị và dần hé lộ một sự thật kinh hoàng, thứ sẽ đẩy anh đến bờ vực của sự tỉnh táo.
data.title: Đồi Câm Lặng: Ác Mộng Trong Sương
